close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: Instance is stuck in stopped state - DAL Staging 4th Zone (DAL10, DAL12, DAL14)
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: 
- IPOPS team observed a blip on  DAL Staging 4th Zone (DAL10, DAL12, DAL14)
- It was a single short lived blip, verified VSI info and ICL logs. 
- No further blips observed, AV dashboard auto-recovered immediately. Provisions happening as expected.
